creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 233591
port patch

- update audio/miniaudio to 0.10.43 (latest in 0.10.x, because 0.11.x breaks API)
- install extra file needed for vorbis support
- change path where files installed
I need these changes for games/jaggedalliance2 port I maintain.
I couldn't find any other consumers of miniaudio in the ports tree, so I think this should not break anythin.
